visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a checkered beret and a purple fuzzy sweater stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, gesturing towards shelves filled with bakery products. She speaks excitedly to the camera while pointing at bags of bread. (2) The camera transitions to close-up shots of green and pink bread bags labeled 'CHRYSMY Honey Grains Bun'. The woman picks up a bag and shows the bread inside, which appears to have a textured, grain-dusted crust. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor dining setting with two women sitting at a table. They have a bag of the honey grain bread open and are breaking off pieces to eat. The background is a simple home interior with warm lighting. (4) The women continue their discussion, holding pieces of bread and showing the inner crumb to the camera. They alternate between eating, looking at each other, and addressing the viewer with expressive facial movements and hand gestures.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 客萊斯麥出新的麵包. [Variety]: 竟有蜜桃果乾. (2) [Variety]: 好吃嗎？. [Subtitle]: 蜜麥穀物軟歐. (3) [Subtitle]: 因為他之前這個維康穀物超好吃. [Variety]: 超好吃. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後他這個蜜麥穀物. 他裡麵包的是水蜜桃乾耶. (5) [Subtitle]: 這個剛剛被我掉地上我就撿起來了. 我會對他負責的. (6) [Subtitle]: 然後我跟你們說客萊斯麥這個麵包好吃. (7) [Subtitle]: 這個我不知道今天新出的. 但是他們的布朗尼真的不好吃. [Variety]: 布朗尼真的不好吃 完全主觀覺得普通. (8) [Subtitle]: 蜜麥穀物軟歐. 他的前一款是雜糧軟歐. (9) [Subtitle]: 這一款的蜜麥呢還加了水蜜桃乾跟小麥粉. (10) [Variety]: 更甜鹹皆宜. [Subtitle]: 我覺得呢他更甜鹹皆宜. (11) [Subtitle]: 非常適合拿來加果醬或者是加一些火腿起司. (12) [Subtitle]: 就是當一種佐餐麵包食用. (13) [Subtitle]: 我自己非常喜歡這一款. 因為雜糧款呢我覺得很容易有你不喜歡的東西. (14) [Subtitle]: 像雜糧款我就不喜歡裡面的金桔. (15) [Subtitle]: 我喜歡 我不喜歡. (16) [Variety]: 口感更扎實. [Subtitle]: 那這一款我覺得口感更扎實. (17) [Subtitle]: 但是他的小麥真的好香哦. 水蜜桃乾也是一個點綴. (18) [Subtitle]: 所以不會搶走整個麵包的風味.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female hosts appearing together in the second half.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman in a purple fuzzy sweater and a black and white checkered hat; another woman in a black top with sheer sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half features Costco bakery aisles with metal shelving and bulk food packaging. Second half features a domestic table setting with a light-colored wall and some interior decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A lively female voice speaks rapidly with a bright, uplifting piano-led BGM. Occasional 'ding' sound effects trigger as variety-style text pops up. The voice is energetic and high-pitched. (2) A subtle 'whoosh' SFX marks a transition to a new setting. The BGM remains continuous. A second female voice enters the mix, engaging in a conversational exchange. (3) Sound of plastic crinkling is audible as a bag is handled. The speech remains dense with an enthusiastic tone. (4) Short 'pop' sound effects occur during scene cuts. The audio is well-produced with clear vocals despite the constant BGM overlap.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Discovery at store -> Close-up product inspection -> Detailed taste-test and comparison at home.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to introduce and review a new bread product (Honey Grain Bun) found at Costco. It combines an initial 'shopping discovery' hook with a secondary lifestyle review segment where two hosts provide specific details on the taste, texture, and serving suggestions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a user-generated organic product review rather than a paid advertisement, though it features specific brands prominently.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy editing style typical of social media short-form content. Effective use of multi-modality cues (on-screen text, energetic audio, and clear product visuals) to drive engagement.
